_comment: Controls which top-level folders the dashboard indexes. Edit this file (no code change needed) to keep junk folders out of the project list. See backend/main.py:load_scan_config for how it is applied.
_include_help: Allowlist of top-level directory names. If non-empty, ONLY these are indexed and everything else is skipped. Leave empty to index everything except what 'ignore'/'ignore_globs' exclude.
_ignore_help: Exact top-level directory names to skip. Hidden dirs (starting with '.') and this app's own folder are always skipped regardless.
_ignore_globs_help: fnmatch-style glob patterns; any top-level directory whose name matches is skipped.
_walk_skip_dirs_help: Extra directory names to prune during deep tree walks (activity feed, file tree, manifest collection), added on top of the built-in defaults.
